name: GH_PointUtil
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Grasshopper.Kernel.Types.GH_PointUtil.)

methods.name: FitPlaneThroughPoints
methods.summary: Fit a least-squares plane through a collection of points.

params.name: pts
params.doc: Points to fit, may contain nulls.

returns.doc: Best fit plane or null if insufficient points were supplied.

methods.name: ProjectPointsToPlane
methods.signature: public static List<GH_Point> ProjectPointsToPlane(IEnumerable<GH_Point> pts, Plane plane, bool include_nulls)
methods.summary: Project a list of points onto the plane. The result will be points in plane-uv coordinates.

params.name: include_nulls
params.doc: If True, nulls in the pts list are maintained.

methods.name: PullPointsToPlane
methods.signature: public static List<GH_Point> PullPointsToPlane(IEnumerable<GH_Point> pts, Plane plane, bool include_nulls)
methods.summary: Pull a list of points onto the plane. The result will be points in 3D world coordinates which are coincident with the given plane.

params.name: include_nulls
params.doc: If True, nulls in the pts list are maintained.

methods.name: RemapPointsToPlane
methods.signature: public static List<GH_Point> RemapPointsToPlane(IEnumerable<GH_Point> pts, Plane plane, bool include_nulls)
methods.summary: Remap a list of points onto the plane. This operation equals a ChangeBasisXForm for each point.

params.name: include_nulls
params.doc: If True, nulls in the pts list are maintained.
